overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked, neon-lit urban alley in Night City. The player character walks past various storefronts including an adult shop with mannequins, briefly interacts with an NPC, and enters a pachinko parlor.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-slicked alley toward the neon-lit commercial district ahead

tall industrial structure with metal shutters and vents
metal safety railings along the right side of the alley
colorful neon signs glowing through the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow, wet industrial alley at night, flanked by tall buildings with metal railings on the right. The ground is slick with rain reflections, and distant neon signs glow through the hazy atmosphere ahead.

segments.scene_description: Entering a more commercial section of the alley, passing an adult store with three mannequins glowing in the window beneath a red 18+ neon sign. The area is dense with neon signage and other pedestrians walking by.

segments.scene_description: The player stops to interact with a Joytoy NPC leaning against the metal railing. Dialogue options appear at the bottom of the screen as other pedestrians walk past in the narrow alleyway.

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the alley, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction. The entrance to Wakako's Pachinko Parlor becomes visible ahead, marked by a glowing doorway, a red chair outside, and a vending machine on the left.

entered.detail: row of glowing pachinko machines with SUPER TIME displays
service counter with red curtains and attendant window

segments.scene_description: Entering the dimly lit pachinko parlor, the scene transitions to an indoor space filled with glowing gaming machines. Several patrons are seated at the machines playing, and a service counter with red curtains is visible at the far end beneath a large overhead screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban alley that transitions from a cold industrial corridor into the vibrant, enclosed atmosphere of a gaming parlor. It begins by moving through a narrow, wet alley flanked by tall buildings and metal railings, where distant neon signs glow through a hazy night atmosphere. As the camera advances into a more commercial zone, the environment becomes denser with pedestrians and bright signage, passing an adult store with glowing mannequins beneath a red neon sign before pausing to interact with an NPC leaning against the railing. The scene then pushes deeper into the alley, weaving past oncoming pedestrians toward the glowing entrance of a pachinko parlor marked by a red chair and a vending machine. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold into the dimly lit interior, where the outdoor rain is replaced by rows of glowing gaming machines and a service counter draped in red curtains.
